sourceIdentityNotes.g5a_u02_5a02: Canonical selector source ID; source packet IDs such as g5a_u02_5a02a remain evidence aliases and are not selector keys.

eligibilityDecisions.eligible_existing_authority: PatternSpec has a controlled semantic signal and its unit already owns structured or partially structured context authority.
eligibilityDecisions.eligible_binding_backfill: PatternSpec has a controlled semantic signal but requires a future ApprovedSemanticBinding backfill before global resolver use.
eligibilityDecisions.not_applicable_non_semantic: PatternSpec is numeric, concept, representation, or non-contextual reasoning only and must not be forced into a context binding.

controlledSemanticSignals.contextTypesPolicy: A non-empty contextTypes array is a semantic signal only when paired with a non-numeric group mode or an approved representation tag.

blockingRules: Every selector-reachable PatternSpec must receive exactly one decision.
A PatternSpec may not receive conflicting decisions through multiple PatternGroups.
Unknown source IDs, empty PatternGroups, empty PatternSpec IDs, and unknown decisions block the audit.
Existing context authority does not make a numeric-only or concept-only PatternSpec eligible.
Non-semantic PatternSpecs remain usable by their current generator and are not migrated to GCTX.
P07 does not create ApprovedSemanticBinding rows or enable runtime resolution.

g4b_u04_4b04.basis: effective 13/13/19 authority with six application PatternSpecs

g5a_u02_5a02.basis: eight Class D application, reasoning-application, or geometry-application PatternSpecs

g5a_u08_5a08.basis: nine application PatternSpecs plus two contextual-reasoning PatternSpecs

distance.distanceReduced: 273 selector-reachable PatternSpecs now have deterministic semantic eligibility ownership without changing runtime
